prevalence.trend: stable; seasonal peaks with viral outbreaks

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Acute cough with sputum after URI; exclude pneumonia and asthma exacerbation

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with supportive care; avoid routine antibiotics

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis in primary care; chest X-ray if pneumonia suspected
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive care, bronchodilators if wheeze; antibiotics only if bacterial infection suspected
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High air pollution and antibiotic overuse
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Primary care access and symptom-based treatment pathways
